description: Run Ledger v1 source availability for user-uploaded Garmin FIT files. Supported means the source can supply the capability; optional values remain null when an individual file or device omits them.

states.meaning: The FIT upload path can supply this capability and reviewed gold contracts may expose it.
The v1 FIT upload path does not contain this source. Its values are absent from API v1, MCP v1, events, and Run Ledger fixtures.

capabilities.definition: Accepted running activity identity, analytical date, start time, distance, duration, speed, pace, ascent, and descent from validated FIT session messages with documented fallbacks in silver.
capabilities.missingBehavior: A file without enough session identity to form an activity is rejected. Individual optional measurements remain null.

capabilities.definition: Ordered timestamps, elapsed time, cumulative distance, deltas, speed, pace, and other record-level values used by gold profiles and segments.
capabilities.missingBehavior: The activity summary remains available; profile or segment operations return nullable fields or insufficient_source_data when no supported artifact can be produced.

capabilities.definition: Session average/maximum heart rate and record heart rate used for descriptive fitness and segment analytics.
capabilities.missingBehavior: Heart-rate fields, efficiency, drift, and heart-rate-band values that require the missing telemetry are null; other activity values remain available.

capabilities.definition: Garmin Recovery HR calculated in gold-compatible upstream logic as final recorded running heart rate minus the latest numeric FIT recovery_hr event value.
capabilities.missingBehavior: garmin_recovery_hr is null when either required value is missing or invalid.

capabilities.definition: Validated record coordinates used by gold to create route identity, bounded display geometry, record coverage, route geography, and route comparisons.
capabilities.missingBehavior: Route identifiers, geometry, geography, and GPS coverage remain null or unavailable; the non-spatial activity summary remains available.

capabilities.definition: Session ascent/descent and record altitude used by gold for elevation profiles, segment elevation change/grade, and route altitude range.
capabilities.missingBehavior: Altitude-derived fields remain null without required telemetry; distance and duration remain available.

capabilities.definition: FIT per-leg cadence normalized to total steps per minute in silver and exposed through gold profile and segment fields.
Record temperature in canonical degrees Celsius for the bounded activity profile.
Contract, data-version, analytical-timezone, freshness, and publication metadata produced with an atomic analytical generation.
capabilities.missingBehavior: API analytical reads return no_active_generation rather than an incomplete dataset.

capabilities.definition: Daily HRV values and status are not contained in the v1 FIT upload contract.
capabilities.missingBehavior: No hrv_value, hrv_status, HRV coverage count, API field, MCP evidence field, or public snapshot field is published.

capabilities.definition: Daily resting-heart-rate values are not contained in the v1 FIT upload contract.
capabilities.missingBehavior: No resting_heart_rate value, coverage count, API field, MCP evidence field, or public snapshot field is published.

capabilities.definition: Daily all-day heart-rate payloads and coverage are not contained in the v1 FIT upload contract.
capabilities.missingBehavior: No daily heart-rate values or coverage fields are published.

capabilities.definition: Daily sleep score, duration, and interval values are not contained in the v1 FIT upload contract.
capabilities.missingBehavior: No sleep value, coverage count, API field, MCP evidence field, or public snapshot field is published.

capabilities.definition: Owner-only counts of days containing HRV, resting-heart-rate, sleep, or all-day heart-rate payloads are outside Run Ledger v1.
capabilities.missingBehavior: The DashboardSummary.healthCoverage wrapper is absent rather than returned with fabricated zeros.
